payload.title: Review Narada proper MCP surface rebuild
payload.summary: Operator requests narada.architect review the committed MCP infrastructure rebuild before treating it as settled site posture. Review commit 2f6446b1 and the follow-up review recommendation 45294baf.
payload.recommendation: narada.architect should review commit 2f6446b1 for package boundary, launch config, tool vocabulary, break-glass posture, builder admission, and absence of User/PC runtime state import.
